description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:alpine Docker image. Define a deploy stage with a job named pages that runs the exact shell commands: `npm install`, `npm run build -- -bh /travgen/`, and `mv dist public`. Configure the pages job to publish the `public/` directory as a GitLab Pages artifact and restrict its execution to the `master` branch only. Ensure the job is assigned to the deploy stage and no additional services or caches are required.
